nasb.text: and the sash of fine twisted linen, and blue and purple and scarlet material, the work of the weaver, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: and the sash of fine twined linen and of blue and purple and scarlet yarns, embroidered with needlework, as the Lord had commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 以及用撚的細麻和藍色紫色朱紅色線，用刺繡的手工做腰帶；都是照著耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 还用细麻线和蓝色、紫色、朱红色的线绣制腰带。这是照耶和华对摩西的吩咐做的。
